title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at Shadowfax Asia Pacific Associates - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at Shadowfax Asia Pacific Associates - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Join the Shadowfax Asia Pacific Associates family as a Digital Marketing Manager in Rajkot. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Shadowfax Asia Pacific Associates:
Shadowfax Asia Pacific Associates is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Track key performance indicators including GMV, conversion rate, and ROI
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in A/B Testing
• Proficiency in Affiliate Marketing
• Proficiency in Customer Segmentation
• Proficiency in Magento
• Proficiency in Content Writing
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in Digital Marketing
• Proficiency in Product Management

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Annual performance appraisal
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Life and accident insurance
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Rajkot, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Shadowfax Asia Pacific Associates!
